description_long: This is a lifelike representation of a Bengal tiger, featuring a muscular body covered in orange fur with prominent black stripes running vertically along its sides and back. The animal's face is detailed with white fur around the mouth and eyes, black markings on the forehead, and small, rounded ears with black and white patches. Its powerful legs are depicted in a walking motion, with one front paw slightly raised, and its long tail curves gently behind. The mouth is open, revealing sharp teeth, and the eyes are forward-facing, giving an alert and focused expression. The overall build is robust, with a broad chest and strong limbs, characteristic of a large predatory feline. The surface texture appears matte with a slightly rough finish, mimicking the look of real animal fur.
description: A realistic Bengal tiger with orange fur, black stripes, and white facial markings, depicted mid-walk with a muscular build and alert expression.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tiger's face, forward-facing eyes, open mouth, and raised front paw.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full body profile, black stripes, and the curve of the tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back, tail, and the symmetry of the stripes along the spine.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite body profile, leg positions, and facial details in profile.
